seo.default_title: Ukrainian New Wave — Ukrainian-American Nonprofit Organization
seo.default_description: Ukrainian New Wave is a Ukrainian-American nonprofit uniting Ukrainians in the US since 2006 — preserving Ukrainian culture, running the “Nova Khvylka” school, and supporting Ukraine with humanitarian aid.

home.title: Ukrainian New Wave — Ukrainian-American Nonprofit Organization
home.description: A public organization uniting Ukrainians in the US since 2006. We preserve Ukrainian culture and traditions, run educational programs, and support Ukraine with humanitarian aid.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Ukrainian New Wave's history since 2006, our mission, our team, and how we support the Ukrainian-American community and Ukraine.

news.title: News
news.description: Read the latest news from Ukrainian New Wave: community events, festivals, humanitarian aid initiatives, and updates from the Ukrainian-American community.

events.title: Events
events.description: Discover upcoming and past events hosted by Ukrainian New Wave, including festivals, fundraisers, and community gatherings.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Explore Ukrainian New Wave's projects supporting Ukrainian culture, education, and humanitarian relief for Ukraine.

contacts.title: Contact Us
contacts.description: Get in touch with Ukrainian New Wave. Reach out with questions, partnership inquiries, or ways to get involved.
